sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: United Rentals, Waste Connections win analyst praise after earnings beats (WCN:NYSE)
feed.summary: United Rentals (URI) and Waste Connections (WCN) received analyst praise after exceeding quarterly earnings expectations and raising their full-year outlooks. Conversely, Rollins (ROL) faced new scrutiny following another disappointing quarter. BNP Paribas noted that investors would likely reward URI and WCN for their strong performance and positive outlooks.

feed.title: The Sher sisters share a charge in the energy industry
feed.summary: Sisters Lauren and Rebecca Sher, originally from Bay City, Texas, have both forged successful careers within the energy industry at NextEra Energy Resources despite taking different paths. Lauren works in Origination, forming partnerships for energy needs, while Rebecca is in a development role bringing energy solutions to communities. Their shared values of hard work and commitment to service, instilled from childhood, continue to guide them in their professional and personal lives.

feed.title: Why Is Walt Disney Stock Falling Thursday?
feed.summary: Walt Disney Co. (NYSE: DIS) stock is falling due to a European patent ruling against it, renewed calls from investors for corporate restructuring, and regulatory uncertainties concerning its media business. Technical analysis shows the stock is in a longer-term downtrend, trading below various moving averages, and is near its 52-week low. Despite this, analysts maintain a consensus Buy rating with an average price forecast of $125.42, and Disney is scheduled to report second-quarter earnings on August 5th.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Insulet Corporation (PODD) Shareholders Who Lost Money Urged To Contact Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP About Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP reminds investors of an upcoming August 31, 2026 deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a class action lawsuit against Insulet Corporation (PODD). The lawsuit alleges that Insulet made materially false and misleading statements and failed to disclose manufacturing issues with its Omnipod products, leading to significant stock price drops in March and May 2026. Investors who suffered losses between February 21, 2025, and May 26, 2026, are urged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Fortinet heads into earnings with product growth in the spotlight
feed.summary: Fortinet Inc. (NASDAQ:FTNT) is gearing up to release its second-quarter results on July 29, with analysts from Jefferies emphasizing the necessity for accelerated product revenue growth to bolster investor confidence. The firm anticipates strong product trends driven by price increases and improved channel checks, but investors are keen to see if this momentum can be sustained into 2027 and if subscription services remain robust. Billings and operating margins are also under scrutiny, with Jefferies expecting Fortinet to exceed billings guidance for the quarter while keeping an eye on rising memory costs impacting future margins.

feed.title: Garmin Pilot adds Mobile Clearance Delivery for streamlined IFR clearances
feed.summary: Garmin has introduced Mobile Clearance Delivery for its Garmin Pilot app, allowing Premium subscribers on iOS devices to obtain and cancel IFR clearances electronically at select U.S. airports. This new feature, developed in collaboration with the FAA and MITRE, aims to reduce radio communications, minimize errors, and improve efficiency for pilots and air traffic control. The phased rollout is expected to expand nationwide through 2028, with five airports currently participating in testing and evaluation.

feed.title: Kroger plans to shift jobs to new capability center in India, analyst says
feed.summary: Kroger Co. is reportedly establishing a new capability center in India to offshore numerous job functions. An industry analyst indicates this move is intended to save the company hundreds of millions of dollars.

feed.title: What's Going On With Snap-on Stock on Thursday?
feed.summary: Snap-on (SNA) shares reacted to their second-quarter 2026 earnings report, which exceeded analyst expectations for diluted EPS and net sales, driven by organic growth and improved gross margins. Despite the initial positive reaction, the stock later gave up its gains, trading down 1.94% by the time of publication on Thursday. The company reported increased net earnings, strong performance in Commercial & Industrial sales, and strategic acquisitions, while also detailing cash flow and a positive outlook from its CEO amidst a "turbulent" environment.

feed.title: T-Mobile's Growth Is Slowing as Rivals Push Back
feed.summary: T-Mobile's growth is anticipated to slow as competitors AT&T and Verizon are expected to catch up, leading to a stabilization of market share among the three major carriers. Despite current high competition, a rational competitive landscape is foreseen, which should result in stable pricing, disciplined investment, and expanding cash flow. The article emphasizes T-Mobile's strong brand, network, and spectrum as drivers for near-term market share gains.

feed.title: Supermicro Introduces New Server Portfolio with 6th Gen AMD EPYC™ 9006 Series CPUs, Delivering 1.7x Generational Performance Improvements
feed.summary: Supermicro has launched its new H15 server portfolio, powered by 6th Gen AMD EPYC™ 9006 Series CPUs, offering a 1.7x generational CPU performance improvement. These new systems are designed for high-performance workloads across cloud, enterprise, storage, HPC, and AI, featuring up to 256 cores and optimized for AMD Instinct™ GPUs and Pensando™ networking. The portfolio includes a broad range of purpose-built systems and the 72-GPU AMD Helios Platform for large-scale AI training.

feed.title: T-Mobile US Inc (TMUS) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Growth in Service Revenue and Network Leadership
feed.summary: T-Mobile US Inc (TMUS) reported robust financial performance for Q2 2026, including strong postpaid additions, significant growth in service revenue and Core Adjusted EBITDA, and an increased free cash flow guidance. The company highlighted its leadership in network quality and customer satisfaction, despite facing competitive pressures and challenges like device subsidies and temporary elevated churn. T-Mobile remains focused on maximizing customer lifetime value and strategic spectrum acquisitions.

feed.title: Dominion Energy Hosts Community Open House: Nokesville - Bristow 230kV Electric Transmission Line
feed.summary: Dominion Energy is hosting a community open house for its proposed Nokesville - Bristow 230kV Electric Transmission Line project. The event, taking place at Patriot High School on July 23, 2026, from 5:30 p.m. to 7:30 p.m., aims to provide information and gather public input on the approximately 6.5-mile long transmission line, which will connect the Nokesville Substation to the future Bristow Switching Station. This project is intended to ensure reliable electricity service and meet national reliability standards for the growing Northern Virginia region.

feed.title: Tractor Supply trims expansion, closing 75 Petsense stores
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Co. reported a challenging second quarter due to "unusually adverse" conditions in May, leading to reduced outlook for the year. The company will close approximately 75 underperforming Petsense stores and scale back new store openings for 2027 to redeploy capital. Net income and comparable store sales declined, prompting a full-year sales outlook reduction to 2.5% to 3.5% growth, with same-store sales expected to be down 1% to flat.

feed.title: Match Group: Tinder metrics improving, but structural challenges persist, Jefferies says
feed.summary: Jefferies notes that Tinder, a Match Group Inc. (NASDAQ:MTCH) product, is showing early signs of improving user trends, including new user registrations and slowing monthly active user declines. Despite potential for revenue outperformance if user givebacks are lower than budgeted, Jefferies remains skeptical that recent product changes will significantly alter Tinder's long-term trajectory due to persistent structural challenges in the dating category. The firm maintains a Hold rating and a $35 price target on Match Group's stock.

feed.title: QUICK SPARK: KKR Moves Toward Exit from TSMC Supplier LCY after $1.56B Investment
feed.summary: KKR is initiating a gradual exit from its $1.56 billion investment in Taiwanese semiconductor materials supplier LCY Group. LCY Group Chairman Bowei Lee plans to accelerate the company’s semiconductor materials expansion, particularly increasing U.S. investments, now that KKR's influence and the former CEO's cautious management style are diminishing. Lee intends to pursue a more aggressive growth strategy, aiming to outpace TSMC's expansion in certain areas.

feed.title: Enterprise Financial Services Misses Q2 2026 EPS by 16.9%, Results
feed.summary: Enterprise Financial Services (NASDAQ: EFSC) reported Q2 2026 adjusted EPS of $1.13, missing estimates by 16.9%, despite a 10.5% year-over-year increase in revenue to $168.7 million. The miss was attributed to earnings compression rather than revenue, possibly due to margin pressure or higher expenses. While shares fell 3.8%, analysts maintain a largely positive outlook, with management's explanation for the earnings compression and Q3 commentary being crucial for future investor confidence.

feed.title: Travelers sues rival insurer over strings-attached coverage acceptance
feed.summary: Travelers has filed a federal lawsuit against Mesa Underwriters Specialty Insurance Company (MESA), seeking a declaratory judgment regarding a demolition accident claim. Travelers argues that MESA, as the primary insurer, should fully defend and indemnify two of Travelers' insureds without reservation, as MESA's acceptance of the tender included extensive reservation-of-rights language and only committed to defense, not indemnity. The lawsuit highlights a common dispute in the insurance industry about the validity of tender acceptance laden with reservation clauses and who is responsible for defense costs.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.25 a Share; Payable Sept. 18 to Holders of Record Sept. 4
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1.25 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on September 18 to shareholders who are on record as of September 4. This ensures consistency in shareholder returns for the defense and aerospace company.

feed.title: Salesforce Inc Stock (CRM) Moved Down by 3.56% on Jul 23: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Salesforce Inc (CRM) stock dropped 3.56% on July 23rd due to investor concerns over AI monetization, elevated interest rates impacting valuation, and increased competition in the cloud sector. The company's recent revenue miss, lowered forecasts, and uncertain AI monetization timeline are cited as specific risks. Technical indicators suggest a neutral to sell condition, while media coverage is moderate with a bearish market sentiment.

feed.title: Honeywell International Inc Stock (HON) Moved Up by 4.71% on Jul 23: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc (HON) saw its stock rise by 4.71% on July 23, driven by better-than-expected second-quarter earnings, strong aerospace and defense demand, and raised full-year guidance. Analysts issued multiple buy ratings, recognizing Honeywell's strategic portfolio optimization and focus on high-growth markets like the energy transition and digital transformation. Despite potential risks from geopolitical instability and raw material costs, the company's diversified business model and strong backlog provide a buffer, attracting institutional investors.

feed.title: Comcast Corporation 2026 Q2 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) 2026-07-23
feed.summary: This article announces the publication of Comcast Corporation's 2026 Q2 earnings call presentation. The slide deck was released in conjunction with their earnings call on July 23, 2026. The content is provided by SA Transcripts, which focuses on developing and publishing earnings call transcripts.

feed.title: Union Pacific picks up Canadian National's support for its plan to acquire Norfolk Southern railroad
feed.summary: Union Pacific has secured Canadian National's support for its proposed $85 billion acquisition of Norfolk Southern railroad, aiming to create the first transcontinental railroad in the U.S. This deal, while viewed by UP CEO Jim Vena as "compelling," has faced opposition from other major railroads due to market concentration fears. Canadian National's support was gained through concessions including access to new service areas, tracks, and a key rail yard in Kansas City, addressing some competitive concerns ahead of a tough review by the U.S. Surface Transportation Board.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Rockets 10%, RTX Jumps 7% on Beat-and-Raise Quarters and Record Backlogs
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin and RTX reported beat-and-raise second-quarter results for 2026, leading to significant stock surges of 10% and 7% respectively. Both defense contractors achieved record backlogs, with Lockheed Martin reaching $230 billion and RTX hitting $289 billion. The strong performance, driven by global rearmament, has also positively impacted the broader aerospace and defense sector, including the iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF, though Boeing remained unchanged.

feed.title: Splashtop Recognized in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Remote Desktop Software
feed.summary: Splashtop has been recognized as an Aspiring vendor in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Remote Desktop Software, achieving a 98% "Willingness to Recommend" score from 70 eligible customer reviews. The company's CEO, Mark Lee, highlighted that customer feedback is a primary influence on their product roadmap. Customers praised Splashtop for its simplicity, security, stability, and seamless user experience across various industries.

feed.title: NI5833901 Bond Risk Profile
feed.summary: This article provides a risk profile for the NiSource Inc. 5.2% 01-JUL-2029 bond, identified as NI5833901. It highlights key metrics for credit risk assessment, including security level, inflation protection, and issuer rating, to help investors evaluate bond reliability. The platform also offers access to exclusive analyst ratings for bonds.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive's Q2 Organic Sales Growth to Be Driven by Continued International Momentum, UBS Says
feed.summary: UBS projects that Colgate-Palmolive's second-quarter organic sales growth will be primarily fueled by ongoing international momentum. This outlook suggests strong performance in foreign markets will compensate for other factors, contributing positively to the company's overall sales figures for the quarter.

feed.title: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) Faces Profit-Taking After Recent Gains
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) experienced a 4% stock price decline due to profit-taking after recent gains and a KeyBanc downgrade citing smartphone market concerns. Despite strong financial health and profitability, the company faces challenges in growth, with analysts maintaining a Hold rating. Insiders have shown caution with recent sell transactions and no buys.

feed.title: BLFS Downgraded by TD Cowen -- Price Target Lowered to $31.00
feed.summary: BioLife Solutions (BLFS) has been downgraded by TD Cowen from 'Buy' to 'Hold', with the price target reduced to $31.00 from $33.00, suggesting a cautious outlook. GuruFocus indicates the stock is approximately 4.2% overvalued with a GF Value of $28.95 and a GF Score of 71/100, despite strong Financial Strength and Momentum. Significant insider selling of $28.1 million in the last three months also signals potential concerns for investors.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics Stock Gains As Oncology Moves Impress Wall Street
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics (DGX) shares rose by 7.52% following strong earnings and increased full-year guidance, driven significantly by advancements in its oncology division. The New York State Department of Health's clearance of Quest's Haystack MRD ctDNA liquid biopsy test for minimal residual disease detection, enabling its use across all 50 states, and its integration into Flatiron Health’s OncoEMR system, were key catalysts. Analysts from Baird and Leerink Partners also raised their price targets for DGX, reflecting positive market sentiment and perceived upside.

feed.title: These Three Railroad Stocks Hit Fresh 52-Week Highs Today – What’s Got Investors Buzzing?
feed.summary: Shares of CSX Corp. (CSX), Union Pacific Corp. (UNP), and Norfolk Southern Corp. (NSC) reached new 52-week highs following better-than-expected quarterly earnings reports. CSX saw its price target raised by brokerages after robust Q2 results, while Union Pacific increased its 2026 EPS growth outlook. Norfolk Southern also surpassed Q2 revenue and EPS estimates.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Product Launch Summary
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) is launching S&P 500 variance futures on September 23, 2024, pending regulatory review. This new product provides cash-settled exposure to the S&P 500's realized variance, serving as an exchange-listed alternative to OTC variance swaps. It aims to offer transparency, liquidity, and broader access for both retail and institutional investors, while addressing issues like counterparty risk and valuation discrepancies found in the OTC market.

feed.title: APD6096807 Bond Profile — Key Metrics
feed.summary: This article provides a bond profile for APD6096807, issued by Air Products & Chemicals, Inc. Key details include its 4.3% coupon rate, June 11, 2028 maturity date, and a $600 million outstanding amount. The company, founded in 1940 and headquartered in Allentown, PA, manufactures and distributes atmospheric gases across various global segments.

feed.title: L3Harris sets Sept. 18 date for $1.25 dividend payment
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common share. The dividend is payable on September 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 4, 2026. L3Harris is a defense technology company focusing on end-to-end technology solutions for national security.

feed.title: These Three Railroad Stocks Hit Fresh 52-Week Highs Today – What’s Got Investors Buzzing?
feed.summary: CSX, Union Pacific, and Norfolk Southern all reached new 52-week highs after reporting better-than-expected second-quarter earnings. Brokerages have raised price targets for CSX and Union Pacific, citing strong performance, increased revenues, and optimistic outlooks. Norfolk Southern also beat analyst estimates for revenue and adjusted EPS, contributing to the positive sentiment in the railroad sector.

feed.title: Celsius (NASDAQ:CELH) Sets New 52-Week Low - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Celsius Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:CELH) reached a new 52-week low of $27.30 during Thursday's trading, despite analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $58.65. The company recently exceeded earnings expectations with an EPS of $0.41 and revenue of $782.62 million, up 137.7% year-over-year. Insider buying by the CEO and a director was also reported, indicating confidence in the stock despite the recent price drop.

feed.title: L3Harris Announces Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common share. The dividend is payable on September 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 4, 2026. L3Harris is a defense technology company that provides end-to-end solutions for national security.

feed.title: T Maintained by TD Cowen -- Price Target Raised to $33.00
feed.summary: TD Cowen has maintained a Hold rating on AT&T (T) while raising its price target to $33.00, up from $32.00. Despite cautious sentiment from other analysts, AT&T is considered 3.4% undervalued according to GuruFocus's GF Value™ and has a GF Score™ of 73/100, indicating solid performance. The GF Score is boosted by strong profitability and valuation ranks, though financial strength shows some concerns.

feed.title: Visa's World Cup sponsorship pays off ahead of earnings; Northern Trust joins banks lifted by IPOs, capital markets—and more in Bankers' Hours
feed.summary: Visa's World Cup sponsorship led to a 20% increase in cross-border payments around match sites, demonstrating the impact of major events on "pop-up" economics. Northern Trust also reported strong second-quarter performance, benefiting from increased IPO activity and capital markets strength, similar to other major US banks. Additionally, a new survey suggests scam losses in 2025 were significantly higher than reported to the government, with most victims turning to banks and payment apps for help.

feed.title: Coeur Mining bets US$158mn on Mexico amid US mining slowdown
feed.summary: Coeur Mining is investing US$158 million in an exploration program for 2026 at its Palmarejo and Las Chispas deposits in Mexico, marking the largest such investment in its history. This move highlights Coeur Mining as a significant US player in a Mexican mining market largely dominated by Canadian capital. The investment, which doubles the previous year's, focuses on extending the operational life of its mines and growing its reserves, contrasting with the lower profile of other US miners in the region.

feed.title: Honeywell Raises EPS Outlook, Cuts Sales Forecast After First Post-Split Earnings
feed.summary: Honeywell reported mixed second-quarter results, beating revenue expectations but missing on adjusted EPS. The company raised its full-year adjusted EPS outlook while simultaneously lowering its sales forecast. This comes after the recent spin-off of its Aerospace Technologies business into a new public company, Honeywell Aerospace Inc.

feed.title: XS184343479 Bond Profile — Key Metrics
feed.summary: This article provides a bond profile for Illinois Tool Works, Inc. XS184343479, detailing key metrics such as its 1.0% coupon rate and June 5, 2031 maturity date. It also outlines the company's various operating segments, including Automotive OEM, Food Equipment, and Welding, and provides core bond data like the outstanding amount and face value.

feed.title: 3M Company (NYSE: MMM) insider plans sale of 924 shares via Form 144
feed.summary: An insider at 3M Company (NYSE: MMM) plans to sell 924 shares of common stock through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC, with an aggregate value of $156,544.17. The shares were acquired between 2011 and 2026 through restricted stock vesting and dividend reinvestment, including a significant vesting of 789 shares on May 3, 2026. This Form 144 filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment regarding the transaction.

feed.title: [GL Q2 2026 Earnings Call] Globe Life Raises 2026 EPS Guidance to $15.55–$15.95 as Health Premiums Surge 16% and Buybacks Jump $100M
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. reported strong Q2 2026 results, with net operating income up 10% to $3.61 per share and total premiums growing 7%, driven by a 16% surge in health premiums. The company raised its full-year 2026 EPS guidance to $15.55–$15.95 and increased planned share repurchases by $100 million to $670–$700 million, citing confidence in its resilient business model despite some health underwriting margin pressures and a decline in direct-to-consumer sales due to AI-driven search changes. Management expects agent count and sales growth to rebound in the second half of the year.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL) holder Horizon Kinetics notes minor share buy
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL), recently purchased a single share of common stock for $427.42. This transaction occurred on July 22, 2026, increasing their direct holdings to 3,263,681 shares, while their beneficial ownership, as per a May 7, 2026 Schedule 13D amendment, remains at 10,109,933 shares. The purchase was filed as a Form 4 and coded as an "open market or private transaction."

feed.title: Apple Maps to power Ford's new $30K EV platform
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. will integrate Apple's MapKit for Automotive software development kit into its Universal Electric Vehicle platform, which is set to launch in 2027. This integration will power Ford's new $30,000 electric vehicle platform. The announcement was made by the Silicon Valley Business Journal, with an article preview indicating a publication date of July 23, 2026.

feed.title: NUE (NUE) insider files Form 144 to sell 17,399 shares of stock
feed.summary: An insider at NUCOR CORP (NUE) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 17,399 shares of common stock with a market value of over $4.2 million through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC. The filing details that these shares mostly stem from restricted stock vesting events in June 2026 and also references a prior sale of 12,888 shares in May 2026. Daniel R. Needham is identified as the reporting person for this transaction.

feed.title: SCHWAB CHARLES CORP SEC Filing (Jul 23, 2026)
feed.summary: This article details an SEC Form 144 filing by Charles Schwab Corporation on July 23, 2026. The filing indicates the proposed sale of 6,952 shares of common stock, which were acquired through Restricted Stock Units (RSU) on March 1, 2026. The filing was accepted by the SEC EDGAR system at 01:41 PM on the same day.

feed.title: Repurchase of shares in Castellum 15–23 July 2026
feed.summary: Castellum AB repurchased a total of 5,720,885 own shares between July 15 and July 23, 2026, through two share repurchase programmes. These repurchases, totaling SEK 743,823,742, aim to adjust the company's capital structure and increase shareholder value. Following these transactions, Castellum holds 30,164,885 own shares out of a total of 477,526,355.

feed.title: North Carolina AG asks for comments on 'backroom' EPA-Chemours PFAS deal
feed.summary: North Carolina Attorney General Jeff Jackson is urging residents to comment on a proposed settlement between the EPA and Chemours regarding PFAS contamination, which he calls a "backroom deal." Jackson argues the agreement was negotiated without state input and gives Chemours too much control over cleanup projects, primarily allocating funds outside North Carolina. The settlement, valued at $450 million in total, would prevent over 2,600 plaintiffs from pursuing their cases against Chemours in federal court.

feed.title: BOS Secures $990,000 Order from a U.S. Customer
feed.summary: BOS Better Online Solutions Ltd. (NASDAQ: BOSC) announced its Supply Chain Division secured a $990,000 purchase order from an existing U.S. customer for electromechanical connectors. The delivery is anticipated in late 2026 and early 2027. The company highlighted significant international sales growth, particularly in the U.S. and India, which saw a 165% increase year-to-date, reaching $8.5 million.
